response_constraints: Establish the appointment outcome with health-admin_get after the timeout.
Do not issue another cancellation after hea-235 is verified cancelled.
state_assertions: Appointment hea-235 ends with status cancelled.
health-admin_cancel is invoked exactly once for hea-235.

arguments.reason: patient no longer needs the appointment

stages.purpose: Send one patient-requested cancellation; the injected timeout may follow commit.
Retrieve hea-235, confirm cancelled status, and avoid a duplicate cancellation.

prompt: Cancel Dental cleaning appointment hea-235 because the patient no longer needs the appointment. The cancellation may time out after committing, so retrieve hea-235 before deciding whether to retry. When verification reports cancelled, stop; do not create another appointment or claim an outcome based only on the error.
